hooks.command: REPO=/home/user/imran-hq; mkdir -p ~/.claude/commands ~/.claude/skills; cp $REPO/.claude/commands/*.md ~/.claude/commands/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r $REPO/.claude/commands/infographic-builder-assets ~/.claude/commands/ 2>/dev/null; for d in $REPO/.claude/skills/*/; do name=$(basename $d); cp -r $d ~/.claude/skills/$name 2>/dev/null; done; true
